description: MainActivity.kt defines the main Android activity that manages user login, biometric authentication, session locking/unlocking, UI interactions, and navigation for a biometric-auth demo app. It handles lifecycle events, prompts biometric authentication when returning from background, updates UI based on auth state, and orchestrates login/logout flows.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Android activity managing UI and authentication flow, including biometric prompts, state observation, and navigation.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes activity, binds views, sets click handlers, and starts observing auth state and log flow.

methods.name: onStart
methods.description: Handles backgrounded state; enforces re-lock and prompts biometric unlock if needed.

methods.name: onSaveInstanceState
methods.description: Saves biometric prompt state for configuration changes.

methods.name: onStop
methods.description: Marks activity as backgrounded to trigger re-lock on return.

methods.name: wireClicks
methods.description: Sets up button click handlers for login, lock, unlock, call, logout, clear log actions.

methods.name: observeAuthState
methods.description: Collects authentication state updates to update UI and handle navigation.

methods.name: observeStatusLog
methods.description: Collects status log lines to display in the UI.

methods.name: setButtonsEnabled
methods.description: Enables/disables action buttons based on current auth state.

methods.name: maybePromptUnlock
methods.description: Attempts biometric prompt for unlocking session, handles success and errors.

methods.name: routeToHomeIfUnlocked
methods.description: Navigates to HomeActivity if auth state is unlocked.

methods.name: routeToHome
methods.description: Performs navigation to the home screen, guarded to prevent multiple launches.
